name: Iyo the Ronin
description:
Once, she was but the wife of a noble samurai. Once, she was a mother. Now, she is on the run, branded a murderer after avenging the betrayal of her husband. Her life is now that of a wandering ronin, seeking coin and a place to raise her son, her only remaining family...

Before anyone asks, yes, this is based off Lone Wolf and Cub. I know, shocking...
creator: Brenard
